generic.name: Basic Setting
generic.help_center_index_description: Ideal for feature-rich product user manuals

head_html.label: Head HTML Code
head_html.info: This part of the content will be embedded in the <head> tag of the site. Please use standard HTML format.

content.label: Content
content.info: Synchronized from data source, cannot be edited

community.logo_url_info: Logo shown in the site header
community.default_avatar_info: Shown for members who have not set an avatar
community.is_allow_published_info: When enabled, submissions go live immediately; when disabled, staff must approve before they appear.
community.feedback_useful_type_placeholder: e.g. 😊 — configure in app feedback settings
community.feature_tags_info: One tag per line; used to categorize posts.
community.collection_tags_info: One tag per line; used as collections.
community.header_menu_info: Format: menu_name[url — one entry per line.

community_templates.shared_slogan_default: 👋 A maker community to learn and grow together
community_templates.hero_illustration_info: Decorative SVG background; see docs for examples.
community_templates.hero_banner_info: PNG with transparency; see docs for examples.
community_templates.post_collection_info: Choose from collection tags on the home page
community_templates.post_feature_info: Choose from feature tags on the home page
community_templates.post_recommend_info: When enabled, the post can appear in the featured list
